description_long: This is a medieval-style arched wooden gate set within a robust stone frame. The front features vertical wooden planks reinforced with ornate, dark metal hinges and a prominent skull motif carved into the keystone at the top of the arch. The stonework is rugged and blocky, giving the structure a fortified appearance, while the wood shows subtle grain and wear. The back of the gate is plain, with only the wooden planks and stone arch visible, lacking any metalwork or decorative elements. The sides reveal the thickness of the stone frame and the depth of the wooden door, emphasizing its solid construction. This gate would be suitable for use in a fortified urban setting, such as an old city wall, dungeon entrance, or themed park.
description: A heavy arched wooden gate set in a rugged stone frame, featuring ornate metalwork and a skull motif above the door.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, blocky stone frame and the depth of the gate structure.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the wooden planks, ornate metal hinges, and a skull motif at the top of the arch.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the stone frame's thickness.
description_view_3: Rear view showing only the plain wooden planks and stone arch, with no visible metalwork or decorations.
